OpenSSL Release Announcement and Security Advisory - 7th Apr 2026
OpenSSL Release Announcement and Security Advisory - 7th Apr 2026 (CVE-OpenSSL-Release-Announcement)
Summary
On 7 April 2026, OpenSSL issued a security advisory alongside multiple patch releases addressing several
        vulnerabilities across supported versions.
The advisory disclosed multiple security flaws (CVE-2026-31790, CVE-2026-28386, CVE-2026-28387, CVE-2026-28388,
        CVE-2026-28389, CVE-2026-28390, CVE-2026-31789) affecting various components such as RSA key handling, CMS
        processing, and DANE functionality.
SolarWinds products are not affected by the OpenSSL Release Announcement and Security Advisory - 7th Apr 2026,
        and do not use any of the affected components mentioned in the CVEs.
Advisory Details
Severity
Low
Advisory ID
CVE-OpenSSL-Release-Announcement
First Published
04/29/2026
Send an Email
